message:
chore: update .gitignore for daemon logs and temp images

- Add daemon-*.log.gz pattern for compressed logs
- Ignore common image formats (temp/accidental files)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,3 +13,12 @@
 *.dylib
 *.test
 **/vendor/
+
+# Compressed daemon logs (timestamped)
+.beads/daemon-*.log.gz
+
+# Temporary/accidental image files
+*.jpg
+*.jpeg
+*.png
+*.gif
